step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a white waffle-knit short bathrobe loosely tied, neckline open showing collarbones, hair wet and slicked back, bare face mid-skincare application. The composition is a three-quarter angle shot of a warm-oak floating shelf against a soft cream tile bathroom wall, holding a styled lineup of beige skincare bottles, a small ceramic dish with a gua sha tool, an unlit candle, and a small dried flower stem at the right end of the shelf, with her partial reflection visible in the bathroom mirror at the left edge. Only her left shoulder, neck, ear, and a sliver of her cheek are visible at the left edge of the frame, the rest of the composition belongs to the shelf. Her right hand is partially visible at her cheek, fingertips lightly pressing serum into her skin mid-application. Warm overhead bathroom lighting, diffuse golden cast across the oak shelf and cream tile, soft indirect light on her partial reflection. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro 35mm equivalent. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Calm evening reset end-of-day skincare moment, palette of warm cream, oat, oak, soft amber. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face and identity exactly.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, extra fingers, fused fingers, distorted face, asymmetric eyes, unnatural skin texture, plastic skin, AI-generated look, model pose, perfect symmetry, smooth airbrushed skin, glossy plastic skin, illustration, 3D render, CGI, doll-like features, magazine retouching

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: The Alluvi box sits at the right end of the shelf with its front face angled toward the camera, between the unlit candle and the small ceramic dish. It is the visual hero of the shelf arrangement.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box onto the right end of the oak shelf, between the unlit candle and the small ceramic dish, front face angled toward the camera, sitting flat on the shelf surface with a soft warm overhead light catching the front face.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight lowered to 0.7 and true_cfg lowered to 1.3 because only a sliver of the persona's cheek, ear, shoulder, and partial mirror reflection are in frame — the shelf composition is the hero and over-weighting identity could force PuLID to enlarge the persona presence beyond the partial-edge framing the scenario requires.
